title: tetraphyle lycopodioides
intro: Tetraphyle lycopodioides, also known as the four-lobed club moss, is a species of ancient vascular plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Tetraphyle lycopodioides include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing. This plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
